## Summary

- what changed:
- why it changed:

## Validation

- local commands run:
- notable passing cases:
- known untested cases:

## Quality Gates

- [ ] `quality` is green or intentionally not applicable
- [ ] `test` is green or intentionally not applicable
- [ ] `build` is green or intentionally not applicable

## Contracts and Docs

- [ ] affected workspace contracts were updated if needed
- [ ] affected docs were updated if needed
- [ ] ADR added or explicitly not required

## Failure Reporting

If a gate is red, include:
- failing job name
- broken workspace or package
- first actionable error
